## What & Why

<!-- One concern per PR. Link the issue if one exists. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `node scripts/validate-agents.mjs` passes
- [ ] `node scripts/generate-codex-agents.mjs --check` passes (run without `--check` first if you edited `agents/*.md`)
- [ ] For skill changes: behavioral evidence attached (pressure-test transcript or run counts — see `skills/writing-skills/`)
- [ ] For agent changes: `AGENTS.md` contract table updated
- [ ] Korean docs keep noun-ending style (명사형 종결); English is fine for issues/PR text
